commands.review_summary:
The branch adds data-handling policy conformance/docs and changes policy validation so unsupported policy sections and rule keys fail as `policy/policy-jsonc-invalid`.

PR surface: Source +1083, Tests +543, Docs +50. Total +1676 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. A high-confidence source reproduction is `policy compare` with baseline/candidate files containing `channels.denyRules[].action` or `channels.denyRules[].when.channel`; compare only validates `when.provider`, while the new unsupported-key checks live in the doctor/check path.
